controls.title: Agent Goal Hijack
controls.description: Protection against prompt injection attacks that attempt to hijack the agent's goals or override its instructions.
controls.notes: Feature not yet implemented. Requires prompt injection scanning on incoming requests.

controls.title: Tool Misuse
controls.description: Enforcement of tool usage policies to prevent agents from invoking tools in unauthorized or unintended ways.
controls.notes: Covered by AgentGuard policy engine — tool allow/block rules evaluated on every call.

controls.title: Identity & Privilege Abuse
controls.description: Controls to verify agent identity and enforce least-privilege access, preventing privilege escalation.
controls.notes: HITL approval workflow provides human oversight for sensitive tool invocations.

controls.title: Supply Chain Vulnerabilities
controls.description: Validation and certification of agent dependencies and tool integrations to detect supply chain risks.
controls.notes: Covered by agent validation and certification workflow — 100% tool coverage required.

controls.title: Data Leakage
controls.description: Detection and prevention of sensitive data (PII, secrets) being exposed through agent outputs or tool parameters.
controls.notes: Feature not yet implemented. Requires PII scanning on tool parameters and outputs.

controls.title: Data Poisoning
controls.description: Integrity verification of audit logs and agent inputs to detect tampering or data poisoning attacks.
controls.notes: Covered by SHA-256 hash chain on audit events — tamper detection via /audit/verify.

controls.title: Excessive Autonomy
controls.description: Rate limiting and human approval gates to prevent agents from acting autonomously beyond intended scope.
controls.notes: Partial coverage — HITL approvals available but high-risk auto-escalation not yet enforced.

controls.title: Insecure Communication
controls.description: Secure webhook delivery with HMAC signing to prevent interception or tampering of agent event notifications.
controls.notes: Covered when webhooks are registered with a secret for HMAC-signed delivery.

controls.title: Unmonitored Operations
controls.description: Comprehensive audit logging and real-time alerting to ensure all agent actions are tracked and observable.
controls.notes: Covered by persistent audit trail combined with webhook event delivery.

controls.title: Compliance Gaps
controls.description: Formal certification of agent deployments to demonstrate compliance with security policies and standards.
controls.notes: Covered when at least one agent has been certified with 100% policy validation coverage.
